category_sources: source_facts.description says OpenSC provides tools and libraries for smart cards.
source_facts.homepage is the official OpenSC wiki.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is opensc; source_facts.homepage and repository path use the display name OpenSC.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official OpenSC GitHub wiki; official repository README is an additional documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/OpenSC/OpenSC, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies smart-card tools and libraries; package executables include pkcs11-tool and related smart-card utilities.
